name: Capstone
description_short: This URL points to Merriam-Webster's dictionary definition of the word 'capstone,' not a financial services company. No consumer finance operations exist.
description_long: Merriam-Webster's entry for 'capstone' is a standard dictionary definition resource, not a financial services provider. The website content shows only lexicographical information: the word's pronunciation, etymology (first used in 1665), synonyms (pinnacle, culmination, zenith, peak), example sentences from news sources, and related word games. The definition provided explains 'capstone' as either 'a coping stone' or 'the high point; crowning achievement.' There is no business model, no financial products, no lending operations, no consumer services, and no business information beyond what appears in a standard dictionary entry. The URL listed (https://www.merriam-webster.com/dictionary/capstone) is definitively a dictionary reference page, not a company website. This appears to be a data quality issue where a dictionary definition URL was mistakenly entered as a company profile. No legitimate financial services company information can be extracted from this source material.
services: Personal loans (typically lower rates than banks)
pros: Not-for-profit — typically lower fees and better rates than banks
NCUA insured — deposits protected up to $250,000
cons: This is not a financial services company — it is a dictionary entry
No actual business, products, or services are offered

best_for: Lower fees and better loan rates than banks
diagnosis: This URL does not represent an actual consumer finance company. The entry should be removed from the CreditDoc database or corrected with the actual 'Capstone' company website URL if one exists as a financial services provider.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
